title: Scripts CRUD — command + rule .md create/edit/delete-if-loose, reusing primitive-files + FilePrimitiveForm

tests.summary: 6 passed — command/rule path mapping + create/edit/delete + owned-delete guard already covered by the C2 primitive-files suite (command+rule share the same writer/dispatch as skill)

typecheck.summary: 0 errors (CommandEditor + RuleEditor registry entries; no backend changes — primitive-files/detail/dispatch already generic over FilePrimitiveSurface)

build.summary: covered by the C1 build + re-verified at the global gate

e2e.summary: 3 passed — the new Scripts test lists both seeded surfaces (example-command + example-rule), shows two create buttons (New command / New rule), and round-trips a unique command (deploy-note-e2e): create → edit body → delete

by: vision screenshot c3-scripts-list.png vs the shell
designAudit.notes: Two create buttons (one per surface); command + rule rows each show LOOSE + Edit + Promote + Remove; reuses the FilePrimitiveForm drawer; matches the shell; no emoji

video.note: Consolidated walkthrough at the global gate. Re-runnable gate is the e2e command round-trip + the shared primitive-files unit suite.

notes: Scripts CRUD is almost entirely a UI registration: primitive-files.ts, the detail provider, and the dispatch were authored generic over FilePrimitiveSurface in C2, so C3 adds CommandEditor + RuleEditor wrappers + two registry entries. The Scripts category (surfaces command+rule, writer 'split') now shows one create button per surface and full CRUD per row, with the owned→Park guard inherited (a promoted/owned command shows Park, not Remove). Seeded a loose example-command + example-rule into the e2e sandbox so the surface has realistic content.
